name: Level Finance
special_mechanism_summary: Level Finance is a fully on-chain GMX-style perpetual DEX whose liquidity is split into senior/mezzanine/junior risk tranches over a single shared multi-asset pool (LLP). Traders open leveraged positions directly against the pool; the tranche structure allocates asset exposure and PnL by seniority, while a dynamic fee model prices the pool's net skew. A Level Oracle feeds mark prices used for position settlement and liquidation.
notes: C3' combination potential: the senior/mezzanine/junior tranche split over one shared LLP pool is a distinctive, combinable liquidity primitive — all three tranche share prices read the same underlying reserves, so a donation or skew to the pool reprices every tranche at once; the on-chain mark price comes from a readable, lag-prone Level Oracle, opening oracle-timing windows; the pool is the direct counterparty to every leveraged position with no external collateral required mid-transaction, fitting flash-loan-funded atomic strategies. Replaces ApeX as the BSC perp Tier-A pick: Level's perp engine is fully on-chain and extractable as verified source, whereas ApeX's is off-chain/CLOB. TVL is approximate (post-2023-incident decline); sub-threshold accepted by user decision, selected for mechanism novelty + on-chain extractability over raw TVL.
